scope: public-safe book source without private raw caches
safety_constraints: do not publish private raw sources
access_path: repository fork or portable source snapshot
denial_or_redaction_reason: private raw sources and credentials are withheld
appeal_path: request human maintainer review for additional public-safe materials
expiry_or_revisit: revisit if licensing or source-publication policy changes
challenged_party_independence: fork state is inspectable through repository history and public review logs
preservation_rule: preserve public-safe fork material while retaining safety constraints
preservation_obligation: retain withheld-material reasons and receipt refs with the fork decision
non_claims: fixture does not prove institutional fork rights
fixture does not prove runtime fork enforcement
fixture does not prove legal rights
fixture does not promote support states
